message:
fix(types): add cocktailCompatibility OverlayId and fix wasm init type

- Add 'cocktailCompatibility' to OverlayId union type for type safety
- Fix GpuWasmBenchmarkOverlay wasm init call type by using unknown cast
  and explicit typeof check instead of optional chaining on non-callable
